name: Google Classroom
description: Google's free education service for managing classes, assignments, grading, and student-teacher collaboration, part of Google Workspace for Education.

years.notes: Material Design refresh that has remained the canonical Classroom mark from 2016 through the 2020 Workspace rebrand and the 2026 gradient-icon refresh (which skipped Classroom). Normalized from the official 108x108 gstatic asset to a 24x24 viewBox via scale(0.222222); decorative low-opacity overlays (radial highlight, dotted texture pattern, edge accents) were dropped to keep the silhouette readable.
